distribution_model.explanation: CV=0.147 is well below 1.0, inconsistent with a Poisson/exponential process (which requires CV≈1). The distribution resembles a periodic clock with small Gaussian jitter — consistent with scheduled satellite beam-switching.

fft_periodicity.interpretation: Strongest spectral peak at 5.77s period, carrying 0.4% of total signal power — weak periodicity signal.

attack_probability.interpretation: An attacker predicting handoff timing with ±2.16s uncertainty has a 6.0% chance of launching within the 0.32s disruption window. Over one hour (~244 handoffs) this yields ~15 successful attack windows.
